title: E&A Distribution Limited Fabulous Fleece Blankets Soft Cosy Sofa Cover Fleece Bedding Tartan Scarf Design 125cm x 150cm (Red Tartan)
features: These magnificent fleece throw blankets are great chair covers as they gently wrap chairs, serving as a fluffy blanket to relax your body.
Sleep nice and tight at night in your small sofa, recliner armchair or sofa bed double as you become wrapped so comfortably within a fleece throw.
Indulge yourself, friends or loved ones with this couch cover fleece red throw that provides perfect containment of body heat and cozy comfort
Spread the usual throws for sofas and chairs across your home floor space to create your tartan red rugs for living room
The size of the throw blankets, 120 x 150cm, service a great deal of space which is perfect as red bedding for a double bed or sofa bed.
description: Product Description Features of the Tartan Fleece Throw The fleece throws are made up of 100% Polyester. The size of the fleece throw is 120 cm x 150 cm. The fleece blanket throws are available in 3 colours- Red, Blue, Grey. The very soft and cosy fabric of the fleece blanket. You can use this fleece throws anywhere on bed, sofas even during travel time easily. Machine Washable- Care Instructions To ensure the long time quality of the fleece blanket throws, Take care of these care instructions. Synthetic wash at 40 degrees on a delicate cycle. Do not dry clean, iron, or bleach. Tumble dry on a low setting. These fleece blankets or throws are made with love and care for your little ones. Get this blanket for yourself and your family to keep them protected from cold.
